title: ADEPTNA Heavy Duty Giant EVA Foam Hopscotch - Family Garden Games – The Original Playground game for all ages
features: FAMILY GARDEN GAME - Perfect for all the family to play for hours of endless fun. Indoor or Outdoor use
SIZE – Assembled size 210cm x 60cm. 10 EVA foam pieces.
100% NON-TOXIC – Giant Hopscotch is 100% non-toxic and water resistant. Easy to store and clean.
HEAVY DUTY – Heavy duty, non-slip textured surface. Foam pieces can be easily attached and are fully durable
Suitable for 2 or more players. The Original Playground game for all ages
